summary: Phase 14 Business Dashboard activation + metrics tested end-to-end. All 4 backend endpoints work correctly (profile-completion, dashboard-summary new fields, profile-view tracker, fixed bookings/business/stats-detail). Frontend dashboard renders banner (14%, 1/7) + 3 acquisition metric cards. 10/10 backend tests pass (1 skipped due to user creds).

minor.issue: Profile-view dedup uses request.client.host as viewer_key for anonymous users. Behind k8s ingress, 3 sequential anonymous curls from same external IP produced 2 view rows instead of 1 (ingress rotates upstream client_host across requests). Owner exclusion works correctly (owner hits do NOT increment). Consider using X-Forwarded-For first IP or a hashed (UA+IP) tuple to stabilize anon dedup.

issues: i18n inconsistency: ProfileCompletionBanner uses English labels ('Complete your profile to get more bookings', '1 of 7 steps done', 'Cover photo or logo', 'At least 3 gallery photos', 'Business description', 'Operating hours', 'At least 1 team member', 'KYC documents verified') while the rest of the dashboard (metric cards, tabs, headers) is in Spanish ('Vistas a tu perfil', 'Conversion a reserva', 'Top servicios (30d)', 'Sin datos aun', 'Hoy', 'Esta semana', 'Resenas nuevas'). Banner appears to render label_en instead of label_es. Likely cause: ProfileCompletionBanner.jsx is hard-coded to English copy or i18n key resolution falls through to English. PRD says Spanish UI throughout.

action_items: Switch ProfileCompletionBanner.jsx labels to Spanish (use item.label_es field returned by API instead of label_en, and translate the static strings 'Complete your profile to get more bookings' / 'X of Y steps done. 100% profiles get up to 3x more bookings.' / CTA text).

(Minor) Improve anon viewer_key dedup in _track_profile_view to use request.headers.get('x-forwarded-for', '').split(',')[0].strip() before falling back to request.client.host so 3 hits from same browser produce a single dedup row behind k8s ingress.
critical_code_review_comments: _track_profile_view in routers/businesses.py uses datetime.now() twice in the upsert (line 198 for 'day' and inside $setOnInsert for first_seen_at) which is fine but creates two clock reads — acceptable.

get_profile_completion treats workers_count via {active: True} but services_priced uses {active: {$ne: False}} (legacy services with no 'active' field count). Inconsistent boolean treatment between collections — consider unifying.

dashboard-summary: top_services pipeline includes ALL bookings (HOLD/cancelled/completed) in the count because there is no status filter. If business wants 'top by completed revenue' the count may overstate by including HOLD bookings. Consider {status: {$in: ['completed','confirmed']}} match in pipeline.

Phase 14 profile_views collection has no TTL or unique compound index documented; over time table will grow without bound. Recommend creating compound index {business_id:1, viewer_key:1, date:1} unique + a TTL on first_seen_at to auto-purge >90d for GDPR.
ProfileCompletionBanner labels are not internationalized — should use the label_es / label_en fields returned by the API (already provided) keyed off the user/i18n locale.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (banner + 3 metric cards render with correct percentage and testids)

test_credentials: Used testbiz_dashboard@test.com / TestBiz123! per memory file. Regular user creds test@test.com / test123 returned non-200 on /api/auth/login (skip).
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing testbiz_dashboard business which has only KYC verified (1/7 = 14%).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 91 covered Phase 14: profile-completion endpoint (7-item checklist, 14% for testbiz_dashboard), dashboard-summary new fields (profile_views_30d, bookings_30d, conversion_pct, top_services), profile-view tracker (owner skipped correctly; anon dedup partial behind ingress), and re-registered /api/bookings/business/stats-detail (today/pending/revenue/total all return 200 with bookings/count/total_revenue). Frontend banner data-testid=profile-completion-banner and biz-acquisition-metrics with top-services-card render correctly; main visual issue is English labels in banner versus Spanish elsewhere. Pytest results at /app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_phase14_dashboard.xml.
rca of the issue: i18n drift: ProfileCompletionBanner.jsx renders English copy directly. The API helpfully returns both label_es and label_en in items[], but the component appears to read label_en (or hard-code English). Fix: change items[].label_en references to items[].label_es (or use existing i18n hook with locale) and translate banner header/footer/CTA strings to Spanish.
